summary: AI Roommate Compatibility Feature - FULLY WORKING. Backend: 18/18 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified - compatibility badges, breakdown charts, AI insights with Claude integration. REAL AI integration (not mocked).
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/compatibility/calculate/{profile_id} - calculates basic compatibility scores
Backend: POST /api/compatibility/calculate/{profile_id}?use_ai=false - returns matches without AI
Backend: GET /api/compatibility/score/{profile_id}/{target_id} - gets score between two profiles
Backend: GET /api/compatibility/score/{profile_id}/{target_id}?use_ai=true - returns AI insights
Backend: GET /api/compatibility/matches/{user_id} - gets top matches for user
Backend: Compatibility levels return valid values (excellent, good, moderate, fair, low)
Backend: Percentage is always between 0-100
Backend: 404 returned for non-existent profiles
Backend: Matches sorted by compatibility score descending
Backend: AI insights include summary, strengths, potential_challenges, tips, conversation_starters
Backend: Budget, location, lifestyle, habits breakdown calculated correctly
Frontend: Roommate Finder page loads correctly
Frontend: Profile cards display compatibility percentage badge (78%, 82%, 72%, etc.)
Frontend: Badges have correct color coding (green for good/excellent)
Frontend: 'Top match' reason shown on each card
Frontend: Profile detail modal shows Compatibility Score section
Frontend: Breakdown bars (Budget, Location, Lifestyle, Habits) with numeric scores
Frontend: Compatibility reasons listed with checkmarks
Frontend: 'Get AI Insights' button displayed with purple gradient
Frontend: AI Analysis section appears after clicking button
Frontend: AI Strengths displayed (green + icons)
Frontend: 'Things to Discuss' displayed (orange ! icons)
Frontend: Conversation Starters displayed (blue message icons)
Frontend: Connect button with message textarea works
critical_code_review_comments: AI integration using emergentintegrations with Claude Sonnet 4.5 is working correctly - NOT MOCKED
Compatibility scoring algorithm correctly handles budget overlap, location intersection, lifestyle conflicts, and habit matching
Frontend correctly fetches compatibility on profile load and displays badges on cards
AI insights API call takes ~10 seconds which is acceptable for LLM calls
data-testid attributes present on key elements (edit-roommate-profile, save-roommate-profile, get-ai-insights, connect-roommate)
